settings.heading: Sports Day Awards — Trophies & Medals
settings.subheading: Trophies and medals for school and corporate sports days — gold/silver/bronze across every event, champion trophies and house awards, branded and delivered on time. By Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: For a sports day, you need bulk medals across events plus champion and house trophies — gold/silver/bronze from ₹25 a medal, branded with your crest/logo. Meru Trophy supplies the full set on one GST invoice. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252. See our sports-day bundle.

settings.heading: The right award for the moment
settings.text: Sports days run on volume — many events, age groups and a champion at the end. We supply bulk gold/silver/bronze medals plus overall-champion and house trophies, branded with your crest or logo, delivered on time and on one GST invoice. Bundle it via our sports-day package.

settings.title: Medals for every event
settings.text: Gold/silver/bronze across all events and ages.

settings.title: Champion & house trophies
settings.text: Overall winners and house competition awards.

settings.question: What awards do I need for a sports day?
settings.answer: Gold/silver/bronze medals per event/age group, plus champion and house trophies. We'll help calculate quantities.

settings.question: Can you brand with our crest?
settings.answer: Yes — medal centres and trophies carry your crest/logo.

settings.question: Will it arrive on time?
settings.answer: Yes — order 2–3 weeks ahead; we plan to your date.

settings.heading: Planning a sports day?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, recipient and date — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
